name: Orange Spice Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (7 oz each) bran muffin mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the bran muffin mix and raisins.
3. Add the eggs, orange juice concentrate, 6 tablespoons of orange marmalade, vegetable oil, milk, and allspice; stir until well blended.
4. Pour the mixture into 4 greased and floured mini-loaf pans.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove the loaves from the pans and place them on a wire rack.
7. Spread the remaining orange marmalade evenly over the tops of the hot loaves.
8. Cool completely.
Yields 4 mini loaves.
